description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, clean-lined exterior finished in light-colored materials. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through large windows and a prominent front door with glass panels. The roof is flat, contributing to a contemporary architectural style, and the building lacks any visible porch or veranda. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light to the interior. The interior layout is open, with visible kitchen and living areas, and the walls are painted in light hues. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior, and asymmetrical window arrangement. The design is compact and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance with a glass-paneled door and two large windows, highlighting the front facade.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the side of the bungalow with a single window and a glimpse into the kitchen area through the interior layout.
description_view_2: This perspective displays the rear and side walls, with additional windows and a clear view into the open-plan living space.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the back and another side of the bungalow, showing a secondary entrance and more grouped windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
